rulings.Case Title: IN RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP. IN RE: 52 TEDDY AVENUE

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2018 line 1. PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP. IN RE: 52 TEDDY AVENUE's Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Petitioner GRANTED. Surplus funds to be deposited forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Stephen Homs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Limit Deposition And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM's Motion For Protective Order To Limit Deposition And For Sanctions DENIED. Requests for sanctions are denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID ABRAMOVITZ ET AL VS. FARHAT BAJJALIYA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defnedant Farhat Bajjaliya And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Farhat Bajjaliya And His Attorney Of Record, Andrea Murphy In The Amout Of $1,198.05
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFFs DAVID ABRAMOVITZ, BLAIR BRIDGES, and MYRIAM FALLON's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Farhat Bajjaliya And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Farhat Bajjaliya And His Attorney Of Record, Andrea Murphy In The Amout Of $1,198.05 GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendant is ordered to sit for a deposition no later than May 21, 2018 unless a letter from Defendant's doctor stating that Defendant lacks capacity to sit for his deposition and testify in court is provided to plaintiff's counsel. All requests for sanctions are denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER COREY ET AL VS. BROWNING PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-561804 WITH CASE CGC-16-551783
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT 441 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-561804 WITH CASE CGC-16-551783 GRANTED in part. Motion to consolidate all discovery is denied. All discovery conducted to date in 551783 shall be used in 561804. All future discovery (until discovery cut-off (including expert) in 551783) shall be conducted for both cases. Discovery in 561804 shall proceed in accordance with discovery deadlines in 561804, i.e. beyond discovery cut-off in 551786. All future discovery in 561804 shall not be duplicative of discovery conducted in 551783. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER COREY ET AL VS. BROWNING PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder And Joinder In Defendants 441 Ofarrell Street, Llc And Dipak Patels Motion To Consolidate Corey And Drummond Cases For The Purpose Of Discovery; Declaration Of Kurt Bridgman
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC., RICHARD TIPTON, and CHRIS MIDDLETON's Joinder In Defendants 441 O"Farrell Street, LLC And Dipak Patels' Motion To Consolidate Corey And Drummond Cases For The Purpose Of Discovery GRANTED in part. Motion to consolidate all discovery is denied. All discovery conducted to date in 551783 shall be used in 561804. All future discovery (until discovery cut-off (including expert) in 551783) shall be conducted for both cases. Discovery in 561804 shall proceed in accordance with discovery deadlines in 561804, i.e. beyond discovery cut-off in 551786. All future discovery in 561804 shall not be duplicative of discovery conducted in 551783. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TERESITA SANTOS WILLIAMS VS. ALBERTO A. SANTOS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANTs ALBERTO SANTOS, and NELY SANTOS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Causes of action for partition and declaratory relief are sufficiently alleged and are not uncertain. David Butler is ordered to comply with CCP 430.41 in future. Failure to comply may result in issuance of an OSC re: Contempt. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2018 line 6. PLAINTIFF CHOO NG's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Judgment continued to April 12, 2018 to be heard with other pending motion. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers and operative pleadings to department 501 no later than March 29, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALVATORE SABELLA ET AL VS. JANICE CORN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT JANICE CORN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)
